title: Crispy Australian Almonds Gratin
description: A savory, crisp and cozy gratin featuring toasted almonds, a hint of cinnamon, and a rich manteca (butter) emulsion, perfect for a low‑carb dinner.
instructions: Preheat oven to 200°C (400°F) and place a cinnamon stick in the bottom of a small baking dish.
In a saucepan, melt the manteca over medium heat and slowly whisk in the heavy cream until the mixture emulsifies and thickens slightly.
Add the toasted almonds, salt, and pepper to the cream mixture and stir to coat the almonds evenly.
Pour the almond and cream mixture into the baking dish over the cinnamon stick and bake for 10 minutes, or until the top is golden and crisp.
Remove the dish from the oven, sprinkle chopped parsley on top, and serve hot.
